name: Fe Limited
summary: Fe Limited operates as a mining development and minerals exploration company in Australia and internationally. The company explores for battery metals, lithium, nickel, copper, iron, gold, and base metal deposits. It primarily focuses on the exploration of Pippingarra Lithium and the Marble Bar Lithium projects with a 100% interest; Macarthur Minerals Lithium and Gold Tenements project with an option to earn up to 75% interest; and Bryah Basin project with a 20% interest in tenements covering an area of 600 square kilometers. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in West Leederville, Australia.
